title: Too Optimized
description: A modpack with all of the optimizations, along with a few QOL ones.
body:
Too Optimized is a modpack, including tons of optimization mods and a few QOL.

SOME OF THEM MAY BE VERY EXPERIMENTAL. USE AT YOUR OWN RISK.

The optimizations can even 4x your FPS from vanilla.

If you have a low-end PC, this will help with lag and stutter!
